items.name: Overseer Cape
items.description: This cape is shrouded in mystery, with deep, matte black fabric adorned with glowing green accents. Intricate patterns and symbols hint at ancient, hidden knowledge, reminiscent of Illuminati secrets. Glowing green veins and runes softly pulse, suggesting a connection to otherworldly powers. Its tattered edges and mystical designs evoke an enigmatic, dark fantasy allure.
